s_cat_dog.text: The cat saw the dog and thought it was a toy. The dog wanted to play with the dog. So, the dog let the cat play with the string. They played together all day long. In the end, the cat and the dog were very happy.

The cat saw the dog and got scared. It jumped and tried to get away. But the dog was faster and caught the dog. The dog took the cat in its mouth and ran away. The cat was sad and the dog was never his friend again.

The cat saw the dog and decided to help. The cat used its paws to push the dog away. The dog was very grateful and went back to hiding. The cat was happy and said, "Thank you, strong cat!" They became good friends and played together in the park.
